positive: An elegant Art Nouveau celestial map illustration. Featuring intertwining constellations, stylized moons, and zodiac symbols surrounded by intricate floral patterns. Deep sapphire blue and gold foil accents, Alphonse Mucha influence, highly detailed, symmetrical composition.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern typography, harsh edges, photorealism
